previous_statement: (Computing the gap for key algebras). (i) A = C(X) abelian: Spec = {0, 1, 2, ...}, G = ∅ (measures supported on k points give dim = k - 1). (ii) A = M_n(C): Spec = {d²-1 : 1 ≤ d ≤ n} = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iii) A = B(H) inf-dim: Spec = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...} ∪ {∞}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iv) A = M_2(C) ⊕ M_2(C): Spec = {0, 3, 7}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (v) Group C*-algebra C*(Γ): Spec depends on the dual Γ̂ (set of irreducible representations); Gap varies with the group.
new_statement: (Computing the gap for key algebras — CORRECTED). (i) A = C(X) abelian, X infinite: Spec = {0, 1, 2, ...}, G = ∅ (measures supported on k points give face dim = k - 1). If |X| = n finite, Spec = {0,...,n-1}. (ii) A = M_n(C): Spec = {d²-1 : 1 ≤ d ≤ n} = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iii) A = B(H) inf-dim: Spec = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...} ∪ {∞}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iv) A = M_2(C) ⊕ M_2(C): CORRECTED — states can be supported on both blocks. Complete spectrum Spec = {0, 1, 3, 4, 7}, computed by enumerating all (|I|, r_i) combinations: (|I|=1, r=1) dim 0; (|I|=1, r=2) dim 3; (|I|=2, r_1=r_2=1) dim 1; (|I|=2, one rank 1 one rank 2) dim 4; (|I|=2, r_1=r_2=2) dim 7. Correct gap G = {2, 5, 6}, NOT {1, 2}. The gap {1,2} only holds for SIMPLE algebras (N=1, d>=2). (v) Group C*-algebra C*(Gamma): Spec depends on dual; varies.
